summary:
THREATS AND DISGUISED DEVICES: Brandon describes a vision set in New York City involving subways and various concealed mechanisms. He details a tattered, mustard-yellow stuffed bunny rabbit with a white belly, approximately two feet tall, used as a decoy to hide a 3D-printed plastic device. Brandon observes a young girl of Middle Eastern appearance and a boy with a bowl cut utilizing this toy as a disguise. Additionally, Brandon recounts seeing a hollowed-out college book containing an intricate mechanism with chambers of clear and yellow liquids that mix via a trapdoor and linchpin string. He also mentions an Ozarka water bottle and older women wearing thick-soled Nike high-top platform shoes that have been hollowed out to conceal items.

SYMBOLIC VISIONS AND LOCATIONS: Brandon lists several distinct visuals, including a glowing, transparent plant with pink and blue lights resting on a lily pad in a foggy swamp, alongside an elephant shown in profile. He frequently references imagery related to Disney and England, such as Winnie the Pooh, Tigger, Piglet, and a massive tree carved out to resemble Christopher Robin's house with a door, candles, and a fireplace. The geographical focus shifts to England, specifically highlighting Oxford, London, Big Ben, and a red telephone booth. Brandon also notes an acorn with a dark top and a gold bottom, as well as an unusual crucifix outlined in gold featuring a brown-haired man in pink clothing rather than Jesus.

ARCHITECTURE AND BANKING INSTITUTIONS: Brandon focuses on stone and architectural symbols, specifically pointing out an abnormal, sick-looking stone lion associated with the Bank of HSBC and a Shanghai headquarters project. He details another lion's face carved into the wood at the top of an arched doorway inside a palace or castle setting with golden and deep red tapestries. This lion is described as golden, roaring, and engulfed in transparent fire.

ROYAL FAMILY AND FUTURE TIMELINES: Brandon discusses visions concerning the British royal family, noting specific individuals and locations like Windsor Castle and Hampton Court Palace. He observes Kate's declining health, describing her face as pale and mentioning a returning illness. Brandon mentions the children, specifically a chubby-cheeked boy named Louis and his older brother George, who is associated with the number seven. Brandon foresees a transition of power within the family, William assuming control, and a significant acceleration of events. He describes a large turning millstone within a wood-paneled room related to the family's trials. Furthermore, Brandon sees the year 2026 beautifully engraved in stone with lapidary inscriptions and fruit festoons, alongside charred pink wings resembling a fish egg sac with blood veins, and a mountain flower located in the Alps.
